about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Frontend Engineer
about.description:
A frontend engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable, production-ready SaaS and web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

I specialize in crafting high-quality, performant user interfaces with a strong focus on clean architecture, reusability, and user experience. Throughout my work, I’ve built complex dashboards, marketplaces, and multi-feature platforms that are designed to scale and remain maintainable over time.

I have hands-on experience improving application performance by up to 30% through techniques such as code splitting, lazy loading, and efficient state management. I’ve also developed reusable UI systems that reduced development time by around 25%, helping teams move faster and deliver features more efficiently.

I’m comfortable working in fast-paced startup and remote environments, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver polished, user-focused products. My experience includes working closely with designers and backend engineers to turn ideas into reliable, production-ready applications.

In addition to my frontend expertise, I have a solid understanding of backend fundamentals such as Node.js, Express, and APIs, which allows me to build well-integrated solutions and communicate effectively across the stack.

Currently, I’m working on a SaaS product while continuously improving my frontend skills, with a strong interest in building impactful, high-quality digital products.
